Interface ITiledImageServer

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to members that serve tiled images.

[Guid("10BFD112-33D2-4986-997A-F2B6069E45B8")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITiledImageServer
